sEn: We present a simple regularization technique for RNNs with LSTM units, showing that correctly applied dropout substantially reduces overfitting across multiple tasks.
sZh: 我们提出了一种针对长短期记忆（LSTM）单元的循环神经网络（RNN）的简单正则化技术，展示了正确应用dropout可以显著减少多种任务上的过拟合。
absEn: We present a simple regularization technique for Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) with Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) units. Dropout, the most successful technique for regularizing neural networks, does not work well with RNNs and LSTMs. In this paper, we show how to correctly apply dropout to LSTMs, and show that it substantially reduces overfitting on a variety of tasks. These tasks include language modeling, speech recognition, image caption generation, and machine translation.
absZh: 我们提出了一种针对具有长短期记忆（LSTM）单元的循环神经网络（RNN）的简单正则化技术。Dropout是最成功的神经网络正则化技术，但它不适用于RNN和LSTM。在本文中，我们展示了如何正确地将dropout应用于LSTM，并表明它在多种任务上显著减少了过拟合。这些任务包括语言建模、语音识别、图像描述生成和机器翻译。

contrib.en: Shows how to correctly apply dropout to LSTMs by restricting it to non-recurrent connections.
contrib.zh: 展示了如何通过将dropout限制在非循环连接上来正确应用于LSTM。

contrib.en: Demonstrates substantial reduction of overfitting in LSTMs across language modeling, speech recognition, image captioning, and machine translation.
contrib.zh: 在语言建模、语音识别、图像描述生成和机器翻译等多个任务上，证明了LSTM过拟合的显著减少。

contrib.en: Provides empirical evidence that dropout on non-recurrent connections preserves LSTM's long-term memory ability.
contrib.zh: 提供了经验证据，表明对非循环连接使用dropout保留了LSTM的长期记忆能力。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art perplexity on Penn Tree Bank language modeling with a large LSTM.
contrib.zh: 在Penn Tree Bank语言建模任务上，使用大型LSTM达到了最先进的困惑度。

contrib.en: Improves frame accuracy in speech recognition and BLEU score in machine translation.
contrib.zh: 提高了语音识别中的帧准确率和机器翻译中的BLEU分数。

contrib.en: Shows that dropout can make a single LSTM model as effective as an ensemble in image captioning.
contrib.zh: 表明在图像描述生成中，dropout可以使单个LSTM模型达到与集成模型相当的效果。

limits.en: Dropout is applied only to LSTM; other RNN variants are not tested.
limits.zh: dropout仅应用于LSTM，未测试其他RNN变体。

limits.en: Optimal dropout probability varies across tasks and requires tuning.
limits.zh: 最佳dropout概率因任务而异，需要调参。

limits.en: Method does not improve performance when combined with ensemble in image captioning.
limits.zh: 在图像描述生成中，该方法与集成结合时未提升性能。

limits.en: Experiments are limited to specific datasets and may not generalize to all domains.
limits.zh: 实验仅限于特定数据集，可能无法推广到所有领域。

limits.en: Theoretical analysis of why dropout works on non-recurrent connections is limited.
limits.zh: 关于dropout为何在非循环连接上有效的理论分析有限。

items.en: We present a simple regularization technique for Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) with Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) units. Dropout, the most successful technique for regularizing neural networks, does not work well with RNNs and LSTMs. In this paper, we show how to correctly apply dropout to LSTMs, and show that it substantially reduces overfitting on a variety of tasks. These tasks include language modeling, speech recognition, image caption generation, and machine translation.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种针对具有长短期记忆（LSTM）单元的循环神经网络（RNN）的简单正则化技术。Dropout，作为最成功的神经网络正则化技术，在RNN和LSTM上效果不佳。在本文中，我们展示了如何正确地将dropout应用于LSTM，并表明它在多种任务上显著减少了过拟合。这些任务包括语言建模、语音识别、图像描述生成和机器翻译。

items.en: The Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) is neural sequence model that achieves state of the art performance on important tasks that include language modeling Mikolov (2012), speech recognition Graves et al. (2013), and machine translation Kalchbrenner & Blunsom (2013). It is known that successful applications of neural networks require good regularization. Unfortunately, dropout Srivastava (2013), the most powerful regularization method for feedforward neural networks, does not work well with RNNs. As a result, practical applications of RNNs often use models that are too small because large RNNs tend to overfit. Existing regularization methods give relatively small improvements for RNNs Graves (2013). In this work, we show that dropout, when correctly used, greatly reduces overfitting in LSTMs, and evaluate it on three different problems.
items.zh: 循环神经网络（RNN）是一种神经序列模型，在包括语言建模（Mikolov, 2012）、语音识别（Graves et al., 2013）和机器翻译（Kalchbrenner & Blunsom, 2013）等重要任务上取得了最先进的性能。众所周知，神经网络的成功应用需要良好的正则化。不幸的是，dropout（Srivastava, 2013），作为前馈神经网络最强大的正则化方法，在RNN上效果不佳。因此，RNN的实际应用通常使用过小的模型，因为大型RNN容易过拟合。现有的正则化方法对RNN的改进相对较小（Graves, 2013）。在这项工作中，我们展示了当正确使用时，dropout能大幅减少LSTM的过拟合，并在三个不同问题上进行了评估。

items.en: The code for this work can be found in https://github.com/wojzaremba/lstm.
items.zh: 本工作的代码可在 https://github.com/wojzaremba/lstm 找到。

items.en: Dropout Srivastava (2013) is a recently introduced regularization method that has been very successful with feed-forward neural networks. While much work has extended dropout in various ways Wang & Manning (2013); Wan et al. (2013), there has been relatively little research in applying it to RNNs. The only paper on this topic is by Bayer et al. (2013), who focuses on “marginalized dropout” Wang & Manning (2013), a noiseless deterministic approximation to standard dropout. Bayer et al. (2013) claim that conventional dropout does not work well with RNNs because the recurrence amplifies noise, which in turn hurts learning. In this work, we show that this problem can be fixed by applying dropout to a certain subset of the RNNs’ connections. As a result, RNNs can now also benefit from dropout.
items.zh: Dropout（Srivastava, 2013）是一种最近引入的正则化方法，在前馈神经网络中非常成功。虽然许多工作以各种方式扩展了dropout（Wang & Manning, 2013; Wan et al., 2013），但将其应用于RNN的研究相对较少。关于这一主题的唯一论文是Bayer等人（2013）的工作，他们专注于“边缘化dropout”（Wang & Manning, 2013），这是一种对标准dropout的无噪声确定性近似。Bayer等人（2013）声称传统dropout在RNN上效果不佳，因为循环会放大噪声，从而损害学习。在这项工作中，我们表明通过将dropout应用于RNN连接的某个子集可以解决这个问题。因此，RNN现在也能从dropout中受益。

items.en: Independently of our work, Pham et al. (2013) developed the very same RNN regularization method and applied it to handwriting recognition. We rediscovered this method and demonstrated strong empirical results over a wide range of problems. Other work that applied dropout to LSTMs is Pachitariu & Sahani (2013).
items.zh: 独立于我们的工作，Pham等人（2013）开发了完全相同的RNN正则化方法，并将其应用于手写识别。我们重新发现了这种方法，并在广泛的问题上展示了强大的实证结果。其他将dropout应用于LSTM的工作包括Pachitariu & Sahani（2013）。

items.en: There have been a number of architectural variants of the RNN that perform better on problems with long term dependencies Hochreiter & Schmidhuber (1997); Graves et al. (2009); Cho et al. (2014); Jaeger et al. (2007); Koutník et al. (2014); Sundermeyer et al. (2012). In this work, we show how to correctly apply dropout to LSTMs, the most commonly-used RNN variant; this way of applying dropout is likely to work well with other RNN architectures as well.
items.zh: 已有许多RNN的架构变体在长期依赖问题上表现更好（Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, 1997; Graves et al., 2009; Cho et al., 2014; Jaeger et al., 2007; Koutník et al., 2014; Sundermeyer et al., 2012）。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何正确地将dropout应用于最常用的RNN变体LSTM；这种应用dropout的方式也可能适用于其他RNN架构。

items.en: In this paper, we consider the following tasks: language modeling, speech recognition, and machine translation. Language modeling is the first task where RNNs have achieved substantial success Mikolov et al. (2010; 2011); Pascanu et al. (2013). RNNs have also been successfully used for speech recognition Robinson et al. (1996); Graves et al. (2013) and have recently been applied to machine translation, where they are used for language modeling, re-ranking, or phrase modeling Devlin et al. (2014); Kalchbrenner & Blunsom (2013); Cho et al. (2014); Chow et al. (1987); Mikolov et al. (2013).
items.zh: 在本文中，我们考虑以下任务：语言建模、语音识别和机器翻译。语言建模是RNN首次取得重大成功的任务（Mikolov et al., 2010; 2011; Pascanu et al., 2013）。RNN也已成功用于语音识别（Robinson et al., 1996; Graves et al., 2013），并最近被应用于机器翻译，用于语言建模、重排序或短语建模（Devlin et al., 2014; Kalchbrenner & Blunsom, 2013; Cho et al., 2014; Chow et al., 1987; Mikolov et al., 2013）。

items.en: In this section we describe the deep LSTM (Section 3.1). Next, we show how to regularize them (Section 3.2), and explain why our regularization scheme works.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们描述深度LSTM（第3.1节）。接下来，我们展示如何对其进行正则化（第3.2节），并解释我们的正则化方案为何有效。

items.en: We let subscripts denote timesteps and superscripts denote layers. All our states are n𝑛n-dimensional. Let htl∈ℝnsubscriptsuperscriptℎ𝑙𝑡superscriptℝ𝑛h^{l}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{n} be a hidden state in layer l𝑙l in timestep t𝑡t. Moreover, let Tn,m:ℝn→ℝm:subscript𝑇𝑛𝑚→superscriptℝ𝑛superscriptℝ𝑚T_{n,m}:\mathbb{R}^{n}\rightarrow\mathbb{R}^{m} be an affine transform (W​x+b𝑊𝑥𝑏Wx+b for some W𝑊W and b𝑏b). Let ⊙direct-product\odot be element-wise multiplication and let ht0subscriptsuperscriptℎ0𝑡h^{0}_{t} be an input word vector at timestep k𝑘k. We use the activations htLsubscriptsuperscriptℎ𝐿𝑡h^{L}_{t} to predict ytsubscript𝑦𝑡y_{t}, since L𝐿L is the number of layers in our deep LSTM.
items.zh: 我们让下标表示时间步，上标表示层。我们所有的状态都是n维的。令 h_t^l ∈ ℝ^n 为层 l 在时间步 t 的隐藏状态。此外，令 T_{n,m}: ℝ^n → ℝ^m 为仿射变换（对于某个 W 和 b，Wx + b）。令 ⊙ 为逐元素乘法，h_t^0 为时间步 k 的输入词向量。我们使用激活值 h_t^L 来预测 y_t，其中 L 是深度LSTM的层数。

items.en: The RNN dynamics can be described using deterministic transitions from previous to current hidden states. The deterministic state transition is a function
items.zh: RNN的动态可以用从先前隐藏状态到当前隐藏状态的确定性转换来描述。确定性状态转换是一个函数

items.en: For classical RNNs, this function is given by
items.zh: 对于经典RNN，该函数由下式给出

items.en: The LSTM has complicated dynamics that allow it to easily “memorize” information for an extended number of timesteps. The “long term” memory is stored in a vector of memory cells ctl∈ℝnsubscriptsuperscript𝑐𝑙𝑡superscriptℝ𝑛c^{l}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{n}. Although many LSTM architectures that differ in their connectivity structure and activation functions, all LSTM architectures have explicit memory cells for storing information for long periods of time. The LSTM can decide to overwrite the memory cell, retrieve it, or keep it for the next time step. The LSTM architecture used in our experiments is given by the following equations Graves et al. (2013):
items.zh: LSTM具有复杂的动态，使其能够轻松地“记忆”信息长达多个时间步。“长期”记忆存储在一个记忆单元向量 c_t^l ∈ ℝ^n 中。尽管许多LSTM架构在连接结构和激活函数上有所不同，但所有LSTM架构都有显式的记忆单元用于长时间存储信息。LSTM可以决定覆盖记忆单元、检索它或为下一个时间步保留它。我们实验中使用的LSTM架构由以下方程给出（Graves et al., 2013）：

items.en: In these equations, sigmsigm\mathrm{sigm} and tanh\tanh are applied element-wise. Figure 1 illustrates the LSTM equations.
items.zh: 在这些方程中，sigm 和 tanh 是逐元素应用的。图1说明了LSTM方程。

items.en: The main contribution of this paper is a recipe for applying dropout to LSTMs in a way that successfully reduces overfitting. The main idea is to apply the dropout operator only to the non-recurrent connections (Figure 2). The following equation describes it more precisely, where 𝐃𝐃{\bf D} is the dropout operator that sets a random subset of its argument to zero:
items.zh: 本文的主要贡献是提供一种将dropout应用于LSTM以成功减少过拟合的方法。主要思想是仅将dropout算子应用于非循环连接（图2）。以下方程更精确地描述了这一点，其中 D 是dropout算子，将其参数的随机子集置为零：

items.en: Our method works as follows. The dropout operator corrupts the information carried by the units, forcing them to perform their intermediate computations more robustly. At the same time, we do not want to erase all the information from the units. It is especially important that the units remember events that occurred many timesteps in the past. Figure 3 shows how information could flow from an event that occurred at timestep t−2𝑡2{t-2} to the prediction in timestep t+2𝑡2t+2 in our implementation of dropout. We can see that the information is corrupted by the dropout operator exactly L+1𝐿1L+1 times, and this number is independent of the number of timesteps traversed by the information. Standard dropout perturbs the recurrent connections, which makes it difficult for the LSTM to learn to store information for long periods of time. By not using dropout on the recurrent connections, the LSTM can benefit from dropout regularization without sacrificing its valuable memorization ability.
items.zh: 我们的方法如下工作。Dropout算子破坏单元携带的信息，迫使它们更鲁棒地执行中间计算。同时，我们不想擦除单元中的所有信息。特别重要的是，单元要记住许多时间步之前发生的事件。图3显示了在我们的dropout实现中，信息如何从时间步 t-2 发生的事件流向时间步 t+2 的预测。我们可以看到，信息恰好被dropout算子破坏了 L+1 次，这个数字与信息经过的时间步数无关。标准dropout会扰动循环连接，这使得LSTM难以学习长时间存储信息。通过不在循环连接上使用dropout，LSTM可以在不牺牲其宝贵的记忆能力的情况下受益于dropout正则化。

items.en: We present results in three domains: language modeling (Section 4.1), speech recognition (Section 4.2), machine translation (Section 4.3), and image caption generation (Section 4.4).
items.zh: 我们在三个领域展示了结果：语言建模（第4.1节）、语音识别（第4.2节）、机器翻译（第4.3节）和图像描述生成（第4.4节）。

items.en: We conducted word-level prediction experiments on the Penn Tree Bank (PTB) dataset Marcus et al. (1993), which consists of 929929929k training words, 737373k validation words, and 828282k test words. It has 101010k words in its vocabulary. We downloaded it from Tomas Mikolov’s webpage333http://www.fit.vutbr.cz/~imikolov/rnnlm/simple-examples.tgz. We trained regularized LSTMs of two sizes; these are denoted the medium LSTM and large LSTM. Both LSTMs have two layers and are unrolled for 353535 steps. We initialize the hidden states to zero. We then use the final hidden states of the current minibatch as the initial hidden state of the subsequent minibatch (successive minibatches sequentially traverse the training set). The size of each minibatch is 20.
items.zh: 我们在Penn Tree Bank（PTB）数据集（Marcus et al., 1993）上进行了词级预测实验，该数据集包含929k个训练词、73k个验证词和82k个测试词。其词汇表有10k个词。我们从Tomas Mikolov的网页下载了该数据集。我们训练了两种大小的正则化LSTM；分别称为中型LSTM和大型LSTM。两个LSTM都有两层，并展开35步。我们将隐藏状态初始化为零。然后，我们使用当前小批量的最终隐藏状态作为后续小批量的初始隐藏状态（连续的小批量顺序遍历训练集）。每个小批量的大小为20。

items.en: The medium LSTM has 650650650 units per layer and its parameters are initialized uniformly in [−0.05,0.05]0.050.05[-0.05,0.05]. As described earlier, we apply 50%percent5050\% dropout on the non-recurrent connections. We train the LSTM for 393939 epochs with a learning rate of 111, and after 666 epochs we decrease it by a factor of 1.21.21.2 after each epoch. We clip the norm of the gradients (normalized by minibatch size) at 555. Training this network takes about half a day on an NVIDIA K20 GPU.
items.zh: 中型LSTM每层有650个单元，其参数在[-0.05, 0.05]内均匀初始化。如前所述，我们在非循环连接上应用50%的dropout。我们训练LSTM 39个epoch，学习率为1，并在6个epoch后每epoch将学习率降低1.2倍。我们将梯度范数（按小批量大小归一化）裁剪为5。在NVIDIA K20 GPU上训练该网络大约需要半天时间。

items.en: The large LSTM has 150015001500 units per layer and its parameters are initialized uniformly in [−0.04,0.04]0.040.04[-0.04,0.04]. We apply 65%percent6565\% dropout on the non-recurrent connections. We train the model for 555555 epochs with a learning rate of 111; after 141414 epochs we start to reduce the learning rate by a factor of 1.151.151.15 after each epoch. We clip the norm of the gradients (normalized by minibatch size) at 101010 Mikolov et al. (2010). Training this network takes an entire day on an NVIDIA K20 GPU.
items.zh: 大型LSTM每层有1500个单元，其参数在[-0.04, 0.04]内均匀初始化。我们在非循环连接上应用65%的dropout。我们训练模型55个epoch，学习率为1；在14个epoch后，我们开始每epoch将学习率降低1.15倍。我们将梯度范数（按小批量大小归一化）裁剪为10（Mikolov et al., 2010）。在NVIDIA K20 GPU上训练该网络需要一整天。

items.en: For comparison, we trained a non-regularized network. We optimized its parameters to get the best validation performance. The lack of regularization effectively constrains size of the network, forcing us to use small network because larger networks overfit. Our best performing non-regularized LSTM has two hidden layers with 200200200 units per layer, and its weights are initialized uniformly in [−0.1,0.1]0.10.1[-0.1,0.1]. We train it for 444 epochs with a learning rate of 111 and then we decrease the learning rate by a factor of 222 after each epoch, for a total of 131313 training epochs. The size of each minibatch is 202020, and we unroll the network for 202020 steps. Training this network takes 2-3 hours on an NVIDIA K20 GPU.
items.zh: 为了比较，我们训练了一个未正则化的网络。我们优化其参数以获得最佳验证性能。缺乏正则化有效地限制了网络的大小，迫使我们使用小网络，因为更大的网络会过拟合。我们表现最好的未正则化LSTM有两个隐藏层，每层200个单元，其权重在[-0.1, 0.1]内均匀初始化。我们训练它4个epoch，学习率为1，然后每epoch将学习率降低2倍，总共13个训练epoch。每个小批量的大小为20，我们将网络展开20步。在NVIDIA K20 GPU上训练该网络需要2-3小时。

items.en: Deep Neural Networks have been used for acoustic modeling for over half a century (see Bourlard & Morgan (1993) for a good review). Acoustic modeling is a key component in mapping acoustic signals to sequences of words, as it models p​(st|X)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝑠𝑡𝑋p(s_{t}|X) where stsubscript𝑠𝑡s_{t} is the phonetic state at time t𝑡t and X𝑋X is the acoustic observation. Recent work has shown that LSTMs can achieve excellent performance on acoustic modeling Sak et al. (2014), yet relatively small LSTMs (in terms of the number of their parameters) can easily overfit the training set. A useful metric for measuring the performance of acoustic models is frame accuracy, which is measured at each stsubscript𝑠𝑡s_{t} for all timesteps t𝑡t. Generally, this metric correlates with the actual metric of interest, the Word Error Rate (WER). Since computing the WER involves using a language model and tuning the decoding parameters for every change in the acoustic model, we decided to focus on frame accuracy in these experiments. Table 2 shows that dropout improves the frame accuracy of the LSTM. Not surprisingly, the training frame accuracy drops due to the noise added during training, but as is often the case with dropout, this yields models that generalize better to unseen data. Note that the test set is easier than the training set, as its accuracy is higher. We report the performance of an LSTM on an internal Google Icelandic Speech dataset, which is relatively small (93k utterances), so overfitting is a great concern.
items.zh: 深度神经网络用于声学建模已有半个多世纪（参见 Bourlard & Morgan (1993) 的综述）。声学建模是将声学信号映射到词序列的关键组件，它建模 p(st|X)，其中 st 是时刻 t 的音素状态，X 是声学观测。近期工作表明，LSTM 在声学建模上能取得优异性能（Sak et al., 2014），但参数数量相对较小的 LSTM 容易过拟合训练集。衡量声学模型性能的一个有用指标是帧准确率，它在所有时间步 t 的每个 st 上测量。通常，该指标与实际关注的指标——词错误率（WER）相关。由于计算 WER 需要语言模型，并且每次声学模型变化时都要调整解码参数，我们决定在这些实验中专注于帧准确率。表 2 显示 dropout 提高了 LSTM 的帧准确率。毫不奇怪，训练帧准确率因训练中添加的噪声而下降，但正如 dropout 常见的情况，这产生了对未见数据泛化更好的模型。注意测试集比训练集更容易，因为其准确率更高。我们报告了 LSTM 在内部 Google 冰岛语语音数据集上的性能，该数据集相对较小（93k 个话语），因此过拟合是一个大问题。

items.en: We formulate a machine translation problem as a language modelling task, where an LSTM is trained to assign high probability to a correct translation of a source sentence. Thus, the LSTM is trained on concatenations of source sentences and their translations Sutskever et al. (2014) (see also Cho et al. (2014)). We compute a translation by approximating the most probable sequence of words using a simple beam search with a beam of size 12. We ran an LSTM on the WMT’14 English to French dataset, on the “selected” subset from Schwenk (2014) which has 340M French words and 304M English words. Our LSTM has 4 hidden layers, and both its layers and word embeddings have 1000 units. Its English vocabulary has 160,000 words and its French vocabulary has 80,000 words. The optimal dropout probability was 0.2. Table 3 shows the performance of an LSTM trained with and without dropout. While our LSTM does not beat the phrase-based LIUM SMT system Schwenk et al. (2011), our results show that dropout improves the translation performance of the LSTM.
items.zh: 我们将机器翻译问题表述为语言建模任务，其中 LSTM 被训练为对源句子的正确翻译赋予高概率。因此，LSTM 在源句子及其翻译的拼接上进行训练（Sutskever et al., 2014）（另见 Cho et al., 2014）。我们通过使用束大小为 12 的简单束搜索来近似最可能的词序列，从而计算翻译。我们在 WMT'14 英法数据集上运行 LSTM，该数据集来自 Schwenk (2014) 的“选定”子集，包含 3.4 亿法语词和 3.04 亿英语词。我们的 LSTM 有 4 个隐藏层，其层和词嵌入都有 1000 个单元。其英语词汇表有 16 万个词，法语词汇表有 8 万个词。最优 dropout 概率为 0.2。表 3 显示了使用和不使用 dropout 训练的 LSTM 的性能。虽然我们的 LSTM 没有击败基于短语的 LIUM SMT 系统（Schwenk et al., 2011），但我们的结果表明 dropout 提高了 LSTM 的翻译性能。

items.en: We applied the dropout variant to the image caption generation model of Vinyals et al. (2014). The image caption generation is similar to the sequence-to-sequence model of Sutskever et al. (2014), but where the input image is mapped onto a vector with a highly-accurate pre-trained convolutional neural network (Szegedy et al., 2014), which is converted into a caption with a single-layer LSTM (see Vinyals et al. (2014) for the details on the architecture). We test our dropout scheme on LSTM as the convolutional neural network is not trained on the image caption dataset because it is not large (MSCOCO (Lin et al., 2014)).
items.zh: 我们将 dropout 变体应用于 Vinyals et al. (2014) 的图像描述生成模型。图像描述生成类似于 Sutskever et al. (2014) 的序列到序列模型，但输入图像通过一个高度准确的预训练卷积神经网络（Szegedy et al., 2014）映射到一个向量，然后通过单层 LSTM 转换为描述（架构细节见 Vinyals et al., 2014）。我们在 LSTM 上测试我们的 dropout 方案，因为卷积神经网络不在图像描述数据集上训练，因为该数据集不大（MSCOCO (Lin et al., 2014)）。

items.en: Our results are summarized in the following Table 4. In brief, dropout helps relative to not using dropout, but using an ensemble eliminates the gains attained by dropout. Thus, in this setting, the main effect of dropout is to produce a single model that is as good as an ensemble, which is a reasonable improvement given the simplicity of the technique.
items.zh: 我们的结果总结在以下表 4 中。简而言之，dropout 相对于不使用 dropout 有帮助，但使用集成消除了 dropout 带来的增益。因此，在这种设置下，dropout 的主要效果是产生一个与集成一样好的单一模型，考虑到技术的简单性，这是一个合理的改进。

items.en: We presented a simple way of applying dropout to LSTMs that results in large performance increases on several problems in different domains. Our work makes dropout useful for RNNs, and our results suggest that our implementation of dropout could improve performance on a wide variety of applications.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种简单的方法将 dropout 应用于 LSTM，在多个不同领域的问题上带来了显著的性能提升。我们的工作使 dropout 对 RNN 有用，并且我们的结果表明，我们的 dropout 实现可以提高广泛应用的性能。

items.en: We wish to acknowledge Tomas Mikolov for useful comments on the first version of the paper.
items.zh: 我们感谢 Tomas Mikolov 对论文初版的有用评论。
